extract: Persian (Japanese: ペルシアン Persian) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Meowth starting at level 28. Its Galarian counterpart is Perrserker. In Alola, Persian has a Dark-type regional form. It evolves from Alolan Meowth when leveled up with high friendship. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
